title: Door and furniture surface that can be assembled together
abstract: The invention relates to door or furniture surfaces to be used in door and furniture production which will be obtained by cutting plated and raw chipboard (flake board), MDF (medium density fiber board) and HDF (high density fiber board) in intended measurements and connecting of these with an interlocking mechanism.
claims: Claims A wood surface (10) to be used in doors and furnitures, characterized in comprising at least one female board (13) and at least one male board (11) which make up a whole by being connected in different colors, shapes and dimensions. The wood surface (10) according to Claim 1 , characterized in comprising a male board rib (12) which provides interlocking of the male board (11) and the female board (13) in horizontal axis and which is located on the male board (11). The wood surface (10) according to Claim 2, characterized in comprising a female board slot (14) which is located on said female board (13) and in which the male board rib (12) is interlocked. The wood surface (10) according to Claim 1 , characterized in being made of chipboard (flake board), DF (medium density fiber board) or HDF (high density fiber board).
